creator: az@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Close PR, since a had good explanation from Ruslan Ermilov (ru@) and good 
hint from Kris. From Ruslan explanation i understand what we can choose
perfomance or panic, in this case better panic when out of kmem for me.
But it's will be nice someday to saw solution where i god "no more kmem for you"
instead kpanic. Now i don't see reasons to hold this PR open.
